CLI / TUI — htop, btop, lazygit, vim status lines

Clawmachine-fit: S. Live reference. This is what the operator already uses. btop colour gradients + lazygit three-pane + Vim status lines = daily working vocabulary.

Credits: htop/btop/lazygit authors (open source), Terminal Trove, Jeff Geerling blog, Both.org, How-To Geek.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
